**Bright Spots:**

- Historical wins prove you can do hard things: porn addiction beaten, alcohol/weed eliminated, body fat dropped 6%, wellbeing score nearly tripled

**Biggest Concerns:**
- **C0 (Media)** is the root blocker — it feeds C2 (alignment), C4 (writing), and C5 (wake time). At 5.3 hrs vs 3 hr target, this is the domino
- **C3 (Physical Rehab)** at 0% stretching consistency is a critical gap with no strategy defined
- **C1 (Friends)** at 14% success rate — social anxiety + new city is a tough combo
- **C6 (Community)** at 29% unique events — feeding into the friend-making challenge

**Pattern:** Your binary elimination approach (alcohol, weed, porn) has a 100% track record. Your moderation approaches (media reduction, stretching "sometimes") are struggling. Worth considering whether any of these need a binary rule instead.

📊 STATUS: Q1 is ~45% elapsed (mid-Feb). The WIGs need acceleration — none are on track for March 29 targets.
